overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in Western attire approaching a Southern plantation mansion during a rainy night. The character walks along an illuminated garden pathway, passes a fountain, ascends a curved staircase, and explores the upper balcony while rain falls around the warmly lit estate.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy garden pathway leading to plantation mansion

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pathway toward the mansion entrance

entered.detail: large two-story wooden mansion with wraparound porch and warm interior lighting
covered walkway or archway at the garden entrance
ornate black metal lamp post with warm yellow glow
large rectangular stone planter with vegetation
landscaped flower bed with white flowers along the pathway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-slicked brick pathway lined with stone planters and illuminated gas lamps, approaching a large wooden plantation mansion. The night sky is partially visible above, with warm light spilling from the mansion windows.

events.description: character passes the illuminated three-tier fountain on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking past the fountain and approaching the curved staircase leading to the mansion

entered.detail: large stone fountain with three tiers, water flowing, illuminated from below
grand curved stone staircase leading up to the mansion balcony

segments.scene_description: The character passes a large illuminated three-tier fountain in the courtyard, with the mansion entrance and curved staircase becoming more prominent ahead. The rain continues to fall as the character approaches the stairway.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved stone staircase to mansion balcony

events.description: character begins ascending the curved staircase toward the upper balcony

agents.ego_description: climbing the curved stone staircase with wooden railings to reach the mansion's upper level

entered.detail: white painted wooden railing along the curved staircase
glass-paneled double doors with warm light visible inside

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand curved staircase with wooden railings, moving under the shelter of the mansion's upper structure. The fountain falls behind and below as the character climbs toward the balcony level.

events.description: character pauses to look down at the illuminated gazebo in the garden below
character turns left and continues walking along the porch toward the french doors

agents.ego_description: walking along the balcony, pausing to observe the garden gazebo below, then proceeding along the wooden porch

entered.detail: domed iron gazebo with intricate metalwork, illuminated from within, visible in the garden below
wooden siding of the mansion exterior with vertical planks

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the covered wooden balcony, looking down at an ornate domed gazebo illuminated in the garden below. The character then turns and continues along the porch, passing french doors with warm interior light visible through the glass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked garden path toward the elevated, sheltered balconies of a glowing plantation mansion. It begins with the character walking along a brick pathway lined with stone planters and gas lamps, moving through the falling rain toward the warm light of the estate. As the character passes a large, illuminated three-tier fountain in the courtyard, the perspective shifts toward the grand entrance and a curved staircase. The camera then ascends the wooden stairs, leaving the fountain behind and moving under the shelter of the mansion's upper structure. Finally, the view opens across a covered wooden balcony, looking down at an ornate domed gazebo in the garden before gliding past French doors emitting a warm interior glow.
